items.caption: A promotional graphic for the video game grand theft auto online. it features a stylized illustration of a man in a suit and tie, standing in front of a cityscape with a helicopter in the background. the man appears to be in a state of contemplation or decision-making, with his hands resting on a pile of money and a gun. the text "further adventures in finance and felony" is prominently displayed, suggesting the game's theme of criminal activity and financial pursuits. the rockstar games logo is visible in the upper right corner, indicating the game's developer. the overall style of the image is reminiscent of the game's graphical style, with a focus on the character and the urban environment.
